title: ML Inference Pipeline Prototype
goal: Develop a comprehensive ML pipeline for ASL sign detection and translation, integrating MediaPipe for keypoints, TensorFlow Lite for inference, Kaggle datasets for training, and TTS for audio output, ensuring real-time performance.
scope: Set up ml/ folder with subfolders for data, models, scripts.
Integrate MediaPipe for hand/pose keypoint extraction from camera frames.
Prepare ASL dataset from Kaggle (e.g., ASL alphabet/sign datasets), preprocess for training.
Train or fine-tune a TensorFlow/Keras model for sign-to-text classification, convert to TFLite for mobile inference.
Implement TTS integration (e.g., using Google TTS or Flutter TTS plugin) for text-to-audio conversion.
Create a prototype script that processes sample ASL signs, outputs text/audio, and validates end-to-end.
Document model accuracy metrics, input/output formats, and performance benchmarks (target 60 FPS).
deliverables: ml/ folder with data preprocessing scripts, trained model files (.tflite), and inference modules.
Sample ASL dataset integration (from Kaggle) with preprocessing pipeline.
TFLite model capable of classifying ASL signs to text.
TTS module for converting text to audio output.
Runnable prototype script demonstrating sign detection -> text -> audio flow.
Documentation of model architecture, training process, and expected formats.
Audit report and bug log for this phase.

examples.training_script_snippet: model = Sequential([Dense(128, input_shape=(63,)), LSTM(64), Dense(26, activation='softmax')]); model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='categorical_crossentropy'); model.fit(X_train, y_train, epochs=50)

must_verify: MediaPipe keypoint extraction works accurately on sample ASL imagery/video.
TFLite model loads and infers correctly, with acceptable accuracy (>80% on test set).
TTS converts text to audio without errors, suitable for deaf users.
Pipeline runs end-to-end on sample data, meeting performance targets.
All dependencies (TensorFlow, MediaPipe, TTS libraries) are compatible and documented.
Data privacy and ethical use of Kaggle datasets are noted.
corrections.json is created with fixes for any identified issues.
